    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NumberRuleAppCost
     
    class 
    TopRuleAppCost
    Singleton implementation of the RuleAppCost interface, which denotes a maximum cost (rule applications with this cost can't be afforded at all)
    Subinterfaces with type arguments of type RuleAppCost in org.key_project.prover.strategy.costbased
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    RuleAppCost
    Represents the costs of a rule.
